title: returns
text: returns Define the returned data type of a function or entry. returns DataType Example: returns numeric Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description DataType String A Uniface data type. For more information, see Uniface Data Types . Return Values The returns statement does not affect $status . Use Allowed in all component types. returns should be placed before the params block. Example: Using returns The following code is an example of how to code for the ProcScript statement returns : function multiply returns numeric params numeric parm1 : IN numeric parm2 : IN endparams variables numeric vMultiplyResult endvariables vMultiplyResult = parm1 * parm2 return vMultiplyResult end ; multiply Copy Related Links return Exit from the ProcScript module, optionally returning a value to $status. entry Declare a ProcScript entry, a script module that can be invoked from within the same component. operation Declare an operation ProcScript module.
